overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a dark underground industrial facility. The player moves from a dimly lit B2 parking corridor through a red-lit ventilation shaft and into a small elevator room, showcasing the game's cyberpunk aesthetic with neon lighting and industrial architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: B2 underground parking corridor with industrial piping

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dark B2 corridor, passing industrial crates and concrete pillars marked with level indicators

entered.detail: concrete pillar marked with 'B2' in large black letters
red neon sign with Japanese characters above a doorway
black industrial crates with Arasaka corporation logo
exposed industrial piping and ductwork running along the ceiling
white painted arrows on the red floor indicating direction
metal security door with vertical bars

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a dimly lit underground B2 corridor characterized by industrial concrete pillars, exposed ceiling pipes, and red neon signage. The environment features corporate crates and directional floor markings, with a cool blue-green ambient lighting typical of the facility's lower levels.

scene_state.functional_zone: red-lit industrial ventilation corridor with server racks

events.description: turns right from dark B2 corridor into intensely red-lit ventilation shaft with industrial fans

agents.ego_description: turning right into the narrow red-lit corridor and walking past large ventilation fans and server equipment

entered.detail: large industrial ventilation fans mounted on the left wall
tall black server racks with glowing red indicator lights
intense red neon light strips running along both walls
metal grate ceiling with fluorescent lighting panels
thick black cables snaking across the concrete floor

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrow industrial corridor bathed in intense red neon light. Large ventilation fans rotate on the left wall while server racks line the right, creating a high-tech cyberpunk atmosphere distinct from the previous cool-toned corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: small elevator room with glass partition

events.description: enters a small enclosed room at the end of the ventilation corridor, approaching an elevator or control room

agents.ego_description: entering the small red-lit room at the corridor's end and approaching the elevator door

entered.detail: metal elevator door at the end of the small room
large glass window showing adjacent dark corridor
wall-mounted control panel with red indicator lights

segments.scene_description: The player enters a small enclosed room at the corridor's terminus, featuring an elevator door ahead and a glass partition revealing an adjacent shaft. The intense red lighting continues, illuminating industrial control panels and metal flooring.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a subterranean industrial facility that shifts from a cool, dimly lit corridor into an intense, red-saturated technical zone. It begins by navigating a concrete B2 corridor characterized by exposed ceiling pipes, corporate crates, and a blue-green ambient glow. As the camera moves forward, the environment transitions abruptly into a narrow passage bathed in vivid red neon light, where rotating ventilation fans and server racks replace the open concrete pillars. The scene then culminates as the camera enters a small enclosed room at the corridor's end, moving toward an elevator door and glass partition under the persistent glare of red industrial lighting.
